location_precision.why: Every one of the seven findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. "src/sync.py:14", "src/report.py:11").

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is written standalone with no cross-reference, so no compound failure mode combining separate defects (e.g. the swallowed error at :39 with the append-before-update at :31) is ever explained.

causal_clarity.why: Essentially every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. "Mutable default argument `seen=[]` is shared across all calls, so every user synced ... is permanently skipped as a 'duplicate' in later runs."
